findings.description: Workflow parameter not validated before path construction in complete_workflow_phase()
findings.evidence: Line 951: path = self.workflows_dir / f"{story_id}-{workflow}-phase-state.json" - workflow comes from user input without validation in class method
findings.fix: Add workflow validation: if workflow not in VALID_WORKFLOWS: raise ValueError(...)

findings.description: Story ID not validated in cleanup_qa_markers() before path construction
findings.evidence: Line 526: reports_dir = Path(project_root) / "devforgeai" / "qa" / "reports" / story_id - story_id used without format validation
findings.fix: Add story ID validation: if not re.match(r'^STORY-\d{3}$', story_id): raise ValueError(...)

findings.description: Workflow validation happens after unsafe .get() call in create_workflow()
findings.evidence: Lines 1006-1009: path construction happens even if WORKFLOW_SCHEMAS.get(workflow) returns None - should validate before path ops
findings.fix: Validate workflow before any path operations: if workflow not in VALID_WORKFLOWS: raise ValueError(...)

findings.description: Lock timeout error uses placeholder '<file>' instead of actual path
findings.evidence: Line 401: raise LockTimeoutError('<file>', timeout) - misleading error message
findings.fix: Add file_path parameter to _acquire_lock() and pass actual file path to error

findings.description: _release_lock() silently ignores all exceptions without logging
findings.evidence: Line 430: except (IOError, OSError): pass - no warning logged for lock release failures
findings.fix: Add logging: logger.warning(f'Failed to release file lock: {e}')

findings.description: Dead code path in phase_record_command - record_subagent() never returns falsy value
findings.evidence: Line 466: success = ps.record_subagent(...) returns Dict, not bool; line 468: if not success - this branch is unreachable
findings.fix: Check state file existence before calling record_subagent() or modify method return type

findings.description: Observation ID format hardcoded inline without centralization
findings.evidence: Lines 835-836: hex_suffix = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]; obs_id = f'obs-{phase_id}-{hex_suffix}' - format string scattered in method
findings.fix: Extract to class constant or dedicated method for consistency

findings.description: QA methods lack comprehensive docstring documentation
findings.evidence: Lines 1047-1056: read_qa() and complete_qa_phase() methods have minimal docstrings without Raises sections
findings.fix: Add complete docstrings with Args, Returns, and Raises sections

findings.description: Phase validation logic duplicated across commands
findings.evidence: phase_check_command uses _get_valid_phases() but other commands re-implement validation - inconsistent pattern

positive_observations.description: Excellent input validation in _validate_story_id() with path traversal checks
positive_observations.evidence: Lines 277-306: Checks for .., /, \, null bytes, plus regex pattern matching

positive_observations.description: Atomic write operations using temp files and rename
positive_observations.evidence: Lines 433-468: mkstemp in same directory + shutil.move ensures crash-safe writes
positive_observations.impact: State files cannot be corrupted by partial writes

positive_observations.evidence: Lines 503-543: Gracefully adds missing phases and migrates legacy fields

positive_observations.impact: Callers can handle specific error types for better UX
